BundleInfo.name: ChimeraX-MapReliability
BundleInfo.Author: Sarthak Mohanty
BundleInfo.Synopsis: Color maps by half-map reliability score or build zones
BundleInfo.Description:
Compute windowed gradient-energy reliability from two half-maps and color a reference density surface by reliability score (continuous) or discrete build zones (omit / caution / build).
Matches the cryoem_mrc half-map reliability export used in the thesis cohort.

Classifiers.ChimeraXClassifier: ChimeraX :: Command :: reliability :: Validation :: Color a map by reliability score or build zones from half-maps
ChimeraX :: Tool :: Map Reliability :: Validation :: GUI for half-map reliability coloring
